definitions.funDefinition: In the zombie handbook, abate means to reduce, lessen.
The zombie handbook says abdicate means to give up a position, usually one of leadership.
According to the zombie handbook, abduct means to kidnap, take by force.
In the zombie handbook, abhor means to hate, detest.
The zombie handbook says abide means to put up with.
In the zombie handbook, abstain means to choose not to do something.
